sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87815" key="proknh/mion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκνήμ-ιον</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὀ,</foreign> <sense id="n87815.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inner bone of the leg, tibia,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:190" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.190</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
